rows.label: qev086705_MSG0001
rows.name:
My name's Nastasha, of the Testament.
It's an honor to meet you guys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0002
rows.name: Wait. You know who we are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0003
rows.name: Doesn't everyone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0004
rows.name:
You guys clear all the most dangerous
missions. You're BLADE superstars![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0005
rows.name:
My team has some serious
Lin Lee Koo fans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0006
rows.name: What?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0007
rows.name:
You think we could...maybe
get an autograph later?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0008
rows.name: Um...okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0009
rows.name:
Who on team Nastasha
is biggest Tatsu fan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0010
rows.name:
Who ISN'T a fan of the bravest
little Nopon on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0011
rows.name:
This...single greatest
moment of Tatsu's life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0012
rows.name:
When we left Earth, it felt like
the end. Like everything was over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0013
rows.name:
But life moves on, and people with
it— no matter where they end up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_JNK0010
rows.name: Grin

rows.label: qev086705_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say you can imagine worse
places to start over.

rows.label: qev086705_JNK0020
rows.name: Assert

rows.label: qev086705_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you won't just move
on—you'll prosper.

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0014
rows.name:
And I'll be damned if
we ever lose this one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0015
rows.name:
We'll fight to protect Mira, for
ourselves and everyone else on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0016
rows.name:
You really think that's possible
on a planet like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0017
rows.name:
No, we just have to MAKE it
possible. It's up to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0018
rows.name: And not just up to humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0019
rows.name:
Nopon and others must all
work to prosper together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086705_MSG0020
rows.name: Yeah...that's right.[ST:wait ]
